project: ECOM LISTING AGENT MVP / CONTROL ROOM / ECOM OS V3
purpose: Single GitHub entry point for future chats so they can read the project route, prior mistakes, current blockers, and next action without restarting from server or Windows noise.

environment_roles.github: canon/archive/source/experiments/single-flow memory; new chats must read GitHub archive first
environment_roles.server: runtime only: Telegram bot, eBay runtime, token guard, current pointer, live state; not archive playground
environment_roles.windows: copy/review workstation only; not canonical source

hard_rules: One route only: A -> B -> FINISH -> STOP
No live eBay/Amazon write without explicit live gate and operator approval
No git pull/merge on dirty server runtime
No bot restart without compile PASS and restart gate
No token print or secret print
If command or logic fails: STOP_SAFE -> inspect -> GitHub archive / official docs / internet if needed -> continue
User words are operator input, not blind commands; analyze first, explain briefly if deviating

Archive ECOM OS V3 new product transition V3
docs: archive ecom os v3 server telegram real url handoff
archive: add ECOM OS V3 local audit and blueprint package
archive: add ECOM OS V3 single flow canon transition

current_chat_summary.current_priority: Fix Telegram dry card route correctly before live work: inspect real bot.py flow, build Russian universal marketplace card plan, patch only after review gate.

new_chat_required_first_action: Read primary_readme and this_manifest from GitHub before touching server, Windows, bot.py, live gate, or cleanup.
future_transition_rule: When operator says 'переходим в новый чат', immediately create/update a GitHub single-flow archive under storage/memory/archive/, include README + MANIFEST + large continuation prompt, and only then provide the new chat prompt.
archive_quality_rule: Archive must be readable by a new chat without guessing: include current state, path list, errors, fixes, blockers, next_allowed_action, environment roles, and exact continuation prompt. Do not rely only on zip or local server files.
